entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain grown in Tanzania for home consumption and food security

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: The country where sorghum is grown and the study is conducted

entities.name: HOME CONSUMPTION
entities.description: The primary purpose for producing sorghum in Tanzania

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: A key factor influenced by sorghum production, especially in marginal areas

entities.name: LOW RAINFALL
entities.description: An environmental condition characteristic of marginal areas where sorghum is grown

entities.name: POOR SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: An environmental condition characteristic of marginal areas where sorghum is grown

entities.name: SMIP
entities.description: The SADC/ICRISAT Sorghum and Millet Improvement Program involved in developing improved varieties

entities.name: NSMIP
entities.description: The National Sorghum and Millet Improvement Program involved in developing improved varieties

entities.name: MACIA
entities.description: A recently released sorghum variety (SDS 3220) tested in multiple environments

entities.name: PATO
entities.description: A released sorghum variety (SDS 2293-6) used for comparison with Macia

entities.name: TEGEMEO
entities.description: A released sorghum variety (2KX 17/B/l) used for comparison with Macia

entities.name: SV 1
entities.description: An improved sorghum variety released in Zimbabwe used for comparison with Macia

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the variety SV 1 was released
